specific_question: By August 5, 2026, how many production assets will the lifecycle management team have digitized and calibrated for AI-integrated digital twin simulations across Elexion Automotive's EV plants?
answer: According to Elexion Automotive's 2026 digital readiness roadmap, the asset lifecycle management team is expected to digitize and calibrate 1850 production assets by August 5, 2026, to support AI-driven digital twin simulations for scalable EV customization.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
